AddServiceModal.title: Add Health Check Service
AddServiceModal.presetLoadFailed: Failed to load presets. Please close and try again.
AddServiceModal.customExpectedStatusHint: Leave blank to treat any 2xx response as healthy. Set a code (e.g. 401) if your endpoint returns a non-2xx status when healthy.

AddServiceModal.errorPresetNotFound: Selected preset not found. Please refresh and try again.

AddServiceModal.errorUrlScheme: URL must start with https:// or http://
AddServiceModal.errorExpectedStatusInval: Expected status must be a number between 100 and 599.
